holdings.infoBox: DFAC is an equity ETF with a total of 2550 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.30%, Apple at 4.86%, Microsoft at 3.68%, Amazon.com at 2.71%, and Meta Platforms at 1.75%.

overview.description: The Dimensional U.S. Core Equity 2 ETF (DFAC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects US equities of all sizes with a tilt toward small-cap companies, seeking to provide long-term capital appreciation. DFAC was launched on Oct 4, 2007 and is issued by Dimensional.
